# flashduty_incident (Resource)

Manages a Flashduty incident.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a channel first
resource "flashduty_team" "sre" {
  team_name = "SRE Team"
}

resource "flashduty_channel" "production" {
  channel_name = "Production"
  team_id      = tonumber(flashduty_team.sre.id)
}

# Create a critical incident
resource "flashduty_incident" "database_outage" {
  title             = "Database Connection Failure"
  description       = "Primary database is not responding to connection requests"
  incident_severity = "Critical"
  channel_id        = tonumber(flashduty_channel.production.id)
}

# Create a warning-level incident
resource "flashduty_incident" "high_latency" {
  title             = "API Latency Spike"
  description       = "API response times exceeding SLA thresholds"
  incident_severity = "Warning"
  channel_id        = tonumber(flashduty_channel.production.id)
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `incident_severity` (String) The severity of the incident. Valid values: `Critical`, `Warning`, `Info`.
- `title` (String) The title of the incident.

### Optional

- `channel_id` (Number) The ID of the channel (collaboration space) for this incident.
- `description` (String) The description of the incident. Can be plain text or markdown.
- `impact` (String) The impact description of the incident.
- `resolution` (String) The resolution/solution for the incident.
- `root_cause` (String) The root cause analysis of the incident.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the incident (ObjectID).
- `incident_status` (String) The current status of the incident. Values: `Info`, `Warning`, `Critical`, `Ok`.
- `progress` (String) The processing progress. Values: `Triggered`, `Processing`, `Closed`.
